Video.summary: After Cassarah became Tim’s live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers’ parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?
Video.title: I Seduced My Teenage Nanny

Video.summary: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.
Video.title: My Mom Made Me Lie

Video.summary: Fritz will do anything to help his cousin out - even sleep with his fiancee! Bradley's mom and wife confront him over his affair with his mom's doppelganger!
Video.title: Strange Secret Affairs!

Video.summary: Joe’s obsession with sex toys drove Bonnie to his friend Brent! Andy wants his ex Diane back, but she’s in love with someone else! Kelli’s husband Anthony has been cheating with their neighbor!
Video.title: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!

Image.alt: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!

Video.summary: Paris began prostituting at 11 years old and has continued for the last 10 years. She says she didn't like living by her moms rules so she left home and turned to prostitution to make money and take care of herself. Special guest host, Steve Wilkos is here to help her turn her life around.
Video.title: Steve Help Me Stop Prostituting

Video.summary: Derrick reveals a secret he has been keeping from the woman he has been seeing; lesbian stripper Diana is on a mission to break up one relationship and start a new one; Summer is a lesbian who cannot stop having sex with men.
Video.title: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Image.alt: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Video.summary: Mike is ready to end his relationship with his girlfriend because of her jealous ways; Jared admits a secret; Barry hopes to prove to an exotic dancer that he is not a typical customer and wants a chance at love.
Video.title: Fooled by a Fake Friend

Video.summary: There's no worse time to clash with your family than during the holidays! Donna and Richard return!
Video.title: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family

Image.alt: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family

Video.summary: Brandy admits to sleeping with her pregnant friend's boyfriend; Amanda fears that her fiance has eyes for another woman; Scott hopes he can sing his way back into his girlfriend's heart.
Video.title: Relationships Hit a Sour Note

Video.summary: A man wants to leave his wife for one of her friends; a man sleeps with his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal

Image.alt: A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal
A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal
A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal

Video.summary: These guests say they are here to get naked and reveal their taboo sex fetishes. What could go wrong?
Video.title: Sexy Fetishes

Video.summary: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him she’s a call girl. Amanda’s mom begs her to quit prostitution later.
Video.title: Honey… I'm A Call Girl

Video.summary: CeCe is here to tell her girlfriend, Michelle, that she is cheating with PJ who's a man! Next Silas is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend! Then Mark recently caught his fiance, Liz, in bed with her lover, Angie!
Video.title: Hot Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: Jennifer spent years tracking down her biological mother and when she finally did, she her mother’s husband, Rodney, drove them apart after she turned him down. Refusing to lose her mother again, she turns to Steve for help!
Video.title: Mom, Who Do You Believe?

Video.summary: Terry is accused of raping Angie’s young daughter and Angie allegedly witnessed this heinous incident. The child is now in the custody of her father Larry and his wife Angela, who are determined to get justice for her! Can Steve get to the truth?
Video.title: Somebody Has to Be Lying

Video.summary: Bill is 15 and huffs gasoline every day in order to get high and refused to stop, despite a loving family that wants to see him well.
Video.title: My Grandson is Killing Himself

Video.summary: Cammie is here to find out once and for all if her ex sexually abused their 2-year-old daughter. Her doctor’s examination showed signs of sexual abuse. Her ex denies these allegations. But what will Steve’s lie detector test reveal?
Video.title: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Image.alt: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Video.summary: Katrina is fed up with her boyfriend Ismael's abusive and controlling ways. Katrina says Ismael acts this way because he believes she has been cheating. Then, Christie has been married to Chris for 8 months and he already suspects her infidelity.
Video.title: Accusers Turned Abusers

Video.summary: Kendra says her boyfriend makes her feel like a prisoner in her own home and accuses her of seducing neighbors through the window; Keisha believes that her husband cheats on her when he is at work.
Video.title: I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home

Image.alt: I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home
I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home
I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home

Video.summary: Kids, young and old, vie to keep their parents from getting remarried.
Video.title: Don't You Dare Marry My Parent

Image.alt: Don't You Dare Marry My Parent
Don't You Dare Marry My Parent
Don't You Dare Marry My Parent

Video.summary: Children meet their fathers for the first time In this emotional episode.
Video.title: More Paternity Updates

Video.summary: These couples may have survived the honeymoon phase, but do they have what it takes to last?
Video.title: We're Still Newlyweds…Is It Over?

Video.summary: These wild teens are forced to be accountable for their actions.
Video.title: Wild Teens: Caught on Tape

Video.summary: These men berate their own wives for gaining weight due to pregnancy.
Video.title: My Husband Doesn't Think I'm Sexy

Image.alt: My Husband Doesn't Think I'm Sexy
My Husband Doesn't Think I'm Sexy
My Husband Doesn't Think I'm Sexy

Video.summary: These men shame their wives for their body changes and Sally won't have it.
Video.title: He Won't Love Me Because I'm Fat

Image.alt: He Won't Love Me Because I'm Fat
He Won't Love Me Because I'm Fat
He Won't Love Me Because I'm Fat

Video.summary: Vengeful ex's learn that two wrongs do not make a right.
Video.title: I Got Revenge and It Backfired

Image.alt: I Got Revenge and It Backfired
I Got Revenge and It Backfired
I Got Revenge and It Backfired

Video.summary: These crazy desperate exes appear on the show to try to persuade their partners to come back to the relationship.
Video.title: I'm Desperate to Get You Back!

Image.alt: I'm Desperate to Get You Back!
I'm Desperate to Get You Back!
I'm Desperate to Get You Back!

Video.summary: These women's lives are dictated by their controlling lovers. Today they take a stand.
Video.title: You'll Wear What I Say!

Video.summary: After paternity tests revealed their real fathers, children return to the show to confront them once because they continue to refuse to be a part of their lives.
Video.title: Pay for Your Son

Video.summary: Families confront their racist children in this closed studio, controversial episode.
Video.title: There's A Racist in my Family

Image.alt: There's A Racist in my Family
There's A Racist in my Family
There's A Racist in my Family

Video.summary: These big and beautiful women redefine what it means to be sexy.
Video.title: You're Too Fat to Wear That

Image.alt: You're Too Fat to Wear That
You're Too Fat to Wear That
You're Too Fat to Wear That

Video.summary: Couples that have a 30+ year age gap are confronted and questioned about their relationship on today’s Sally.
Video.title: Old Love
